mapper.select: SELECT * FROM model_config ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM model_config WHERE model_name = #{modelName} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM model_config WHERE is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM model_config WHERE is_default = 1 AND is_enabled = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_config (model_name, api_url, api_key, model_version, max_tokens, temperature, is_enabled, is_default, description) VALUES (#{modelName}, #{apiUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{modelVersion}, #{maxTokens}, #{temperature}, #{isEnabled}, #{isDefault}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE model_config SET model_name = #{modelName}, api_url = #{apiUrl}, api_key = #{apiKey}, model_version = #{modelVersion}, max_tokens = #{maxTokens}, temperature = #{temperature}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, is_default = #{isDefault}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE model_config SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
